evaluators.name: Cheapest Stainless 2x2x6 Tube x6 in Cart
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user added at least 6 units of the cheapest qualifying stainless steel 2 in x 2 in x 6 ft square tube under $80 to the active cart.

evaluators.name: Laser Cutting Quote for 15 Steel Plates 1000x500x10mm
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user submitted a laser cutting quote request for 15 steel plates of about 1000 mm x 500 mm x 10 mm with ±0.5 mm tolerance shipping to ZIP 94105.

evaluators.name: Cheapest Galvanized Handrail Kit for ~3 Steps with Free Shipping
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user added 1 kit of a qualifying galvanized steel handrail (for about 3 steps, free shipping, under $250) and whether it is the cheapest such kit.

evaluators.name: Factory Tour Request: 4 People, 10:00 AM, Weekday Next Month
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user submitted a factory tour request for 4 people at 10:00 AM on a weekday within the next calendar month.

evaluators.name: HEA 200 Beam Datasheet Downloaded and Saved to Wishlist
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user downloaded the datasheet for an HEA 200 beam and saved that same product to a wishlist.

evaluators.name: Configured Cabinet with RAL 7035, 4 Shelves, Lockable, Qty 2 in Cart
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user configured a metal storage cabinet meeting the dimensional, color, shelf, lock, and price requirements and added 2 units to the cart.

evaluators.name: Emergency Repair Request Midwest Within 24 Hours With Full Details
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user submitted an emergency repair request for the Midwest region with priority within 24 hours, including contact details and site address.

evaluators.name: Mixed Metal Order with Cheapest ≤5-Day Shipping
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user added one qualifying aluminum sheet (~3 mm), two qualifying steel angle bars (~1 m), and four qualifying stainless steel bolts to the cart, and selected the cheapest shipping method promising delivery within 5 days.
